channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Report Finds Significant Declines in Traffic Across Major Conservative News Websites in May 2026
item.description: A report highlighted by media watchdog Status indicates that major conservative and far-right news websites experienced substantial declines in web traffic during May 2026. Data compiled by The Righti...

item.title: Report Says Justice Department Officials Are Exploring Alternative Ways to Compensate Trump Allies After Cancellation of Anti-Weaponization Fund
item.description: A report by The Atlantic alleges that plans connected to the Trump administration's proposed $1.776 billion 'Anti-Weaponization' fund may not have been fully abandoned despite public statements that t...

item.title: Kenyan Opposition Proposes Alternative 2026/27 Budget and Criticises Government Spending Plans
item.description: Kenya's opposition coalition, operating under the United Alternative Government banner, has launched an alternative economic proposal dubbed the 'People's Budget' ahead of the 2026/27 national budget ...

item.title: Poll Finds Most Americans Believe U.S. Global Reputation Has Declined Under Trump Ahead of World Cup
item.description: A new poll released by Data for Progress indicates that a majority of American voters believe the United States' international reputation has worsened during President Donald Trump's second term, just...

item.title: Fox & Friends Host Highlights Growing Republican Concerns Over Trump's Iran War and Midterm Impact
item.description: During a live Fox & Friends segment, host Ainsley Earhardt expressed concern that many Republican and MAGA-aligned viewers are becoming weary of the ongoing U.S. military conflict with Iran. Speaking ...

item.title: Galway Skin Clinic highlights medical-led dermatology and advanced aesthetic treatments in Galway
item.description: The Galway Skin Clinic, founded in 2020 by Dr. Brian Higgins, is presented as a leading medical and aesthetic skin care provider based in Galway, Ireland. Established by a family doctor with a special...

item.title: Trump Says U.S. Could Target Iranian Oil Infrastructure and Seek Control of Key Energy Assets

item.title: Analyst warns Trump’s inflation remarks could create political problems for Republicans ahead of midterms
item.description: A political analyst and former Trump administration staffer has suggested that recent comments by President Donald Trump on inflation could become a liability for Republicans heading into the midterm ...

item.title: Analyst questions credibility of California election fraud investigation claims by Trump-aligned prosecutor
item.description: A Trump-aligned prosecutor, Bill Essayli, has sparked controversy after suggesting that California’s recent primary elections may have involved fraud and promising potential charges within two months....

item.title: MS NOW Panel Mocks Trump's Remark About Inflation During Discussion of Economic Issues
item.description: A segment on MS NOW's 'Morning Joe' focused on a comment made by President Donald Trump during a conversation with reporters in which he said, 'I love the inflation.' The remark quickly became the sub...

item.title: Humanoid robot Pemba undergoes high-altitude field testing on Ecuador’s Chimborazo volcano
item.description: A modified humanoid robot named Pemba has successfully reached the summit of Chimborazo, a 6,200-meter (20,341-foot) volcano in Ecuador, in what researchers describe as a demanding real-world field ex...

item.title: How Sunscreens Protect Against UV Radiation and Reduce Skin Cancer Risk
item.description: This article explains why sunscreen should be considered an essential preventive health measure rather than merely a cosmetic product. It begins by describing the different types of solar radiation th...

item.title: New Inflation Data Shows Real Wage Growth Has Nearly Stalled Since January 2025
item.description: A report highlighted new economic data indicating that one of President Donald Trump's strongest economic talking points—growth in inflation-adjusted wages—has largely disappeared. According to the la...

item.title: Kiambu boda boda rider’s final WhatsApp message emerges after tragic family deaths
item.description: A tragic incident in Riamute Village, Githunguri in Kiambu County has left residents in shock after a boda boda rider, Kennedy Kamau Kabaiko, his wife, and their two-year-old son were found dead in ci...

item.title: Researchers Discover Ancient Whale-Fall Ecosystem Stretching 1,200 Kilometres Across the Indian Ocean Seafloor
item.description: Scientists have uncovered a remarkable ancient whale graveyard in the Diamantina Zone of the southeastern Indian Ocean, revealing one of the deepest and most extensive whale-fall ecosystems ever docum...

item.title: Senior Senate Republicans Question Trump's Proposal for a $1.5 Trillion Pentagon Budget
item.description: President Donald Trump's effort to dramatically increase military spending is facing resistance from key members of his own party in the Senate. Trump recently urged Republicans to quickly approve a $...

item.title: A Look Back at Monica Lewis, Singer, Actress, and Mid-Century American Entertainer
item.description: The article from Vintage Everyday highlights the life and career of Monica Lewis (1922–2015), an American singer, actress, and popular pin-up figure who became well known during the 1940s and 1950s. R...

item.title: Sofía Vergara Advocates Preventive Health Care While Supporting Her Mother’s Well-Being
item.description: Actress Sofía Vergara has spoken about her commitment to helping her mother maintain good health and her own desire to live a long and healthy life. In a recent interview, the 53-year-old star explain...

item.title: Podcast discusses AUKUS production concerns, criticism of social media restrictions for under-16s, and Pauline Hanson's Western Australia campaign
item.description: This episode of The Nightly's News Worthy podcast, presented by Ben O'Shea, covers three major Australian political and public policy topics. The first segment focuses on concerns surrounding the AUKU...

item.title: Rare Behind-the-Scenes Photos Highlight Gene Wilder’s Performance in Young Frankenstein
item.description: This article showcases a collection of 35 behind-the-scenes photographs of Gene Wilder during the production of the 1974 comedy film Young Frankenstein. The piece reflects on Wilder’s role as Dr. Fred...
